classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: NEMA 17 compatible □42mm square flange with 4-M3 mounting holes and □31±0.2mm centering boss. Rear mounting interface 15±0.2mm.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Output shaft Φ22 +0/-0.05mm diameter, 24±1mm length, with 1.8mm deep D-cut flat and 10±1mm shoulder protrusion.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Motor body 61mm length with □42mm square flange. Total assembly requires consideration of 320±20mm cable length.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: UL1007 AWG24 wire specification for motor leads, 320±20mm length from body.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Mounting hole PCD (pitch circle diameter) not explicitly dimensioned but typical for NEMA 17. Shaft flat width not specified. Surface roughness metric (Ra, Rz) not specified.

unresolved_items.reason: Standard NEMA 17 typically uses 31mm PCD but not explicitly dimensioned in visible annotations
unresolved_items.visual_evidence: Four holes visible on flange but no dimension line for PCD
unresolved_items.recommended_action: Verify against NEMA 17 standard (typically 31mm PCD) or measure from CAD model

unresolved_items.reason: Flat depth 1.8mm is specified but flat width (chord length) is not dimensioned
unresolved_items.visual_evidence: D-cut visible on shaft but no width dimension
unresolved_items.recommended_action: Calculate from Φ22 and 1.8mm depth or verify design intent

unresolved_items.reason: ▽4min notation present but specific roughness parameter (Ra, Rz, etc.) not specified
unresolved_items.recommended_action: Clarify if this is Ra 4μm or other roughness standard

classification.category_basis: 用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。必须体现针脚功能、线序、线色、接线关系或接口定义；仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向或连接器安装位置时，不应归入本类。
